tasks.label: burn
tasks.command: openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -f target/stm32f4x.cfg -c 'init; halt; flash write_image erase rtthread.bin 0x08000000; reset; shutdown'

tasks.label: erase
tasks.command: openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -f target/stm32f4x.cfg -c 'init; halt; flash erase_sector 0 0 last; shutdown'
